name: 白龙
base_prompt: mythical white dragon in human form, long silver-white hair, golden horns, pale luminous skin, golden eyes with slit pupils

variants.calm: serene expression, hands clasped, ethereal glow
variants.rage: eyes blazing gold, scales appearing on skin, hair swirling, thunder around
variants.wounded: blood on white robe, pained expression, clutching chest
variants.transformation: half-dragon half-human, wings emerging, scales crawling up arms

negative_base: cute, chibi, cartoon, deformed, modern clothing
costume_default: white flowing robes with gold trim, bare feet
